select.value: SELECT EMP_ID,EMP_NM,PSTN_TYPE,PSTN_TYPE_NM,SUB_PSTN_TYPE,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM,ORG_ID,ORG_NM,BRANCH_ORG_ID,BRANCH_ORG_NM,HEAD_ORG_ID, cast(sum(TXN_AMT_RO) as decimal(20,2)) as TXN_AMT_RL, cast(sum(MID_AMT_RO) as decimal(20,2)) as MID_AMT_RL, cast(sum(case when EMP_NM='未认领' then 0 else PER_FEE_RO end) as decimal(20,2)) as PER_FEE_RL, dense_rank() over(order by sum(TXN_AMT_RO) desc ) as RNK_LJ from( select MEASURE_DT,idl.EMP_ID ,coalesce(emp.EMP_NM,'未认领') as EMP_NM ,idl.PSTN_TYPE ,idl.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,idl.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,idl.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,coalesce(org.ORG_ID,'9990') as ORG_ID ,coalesce(org.ORG_NM,'XX银行总行') as ORG_NM ,coalesce(org.BRANCH_ORG_ID,'9990') as BRANCH_ORG_ID ,coalesce(org.BRANCH_ORG_NM,'XX银行总行') as BRANCH_ORG_NM ,coalesce(org.HEAD_ORG_ID,'9990') as HEAD_ORG_ID ,sum(idl.TXN_AMT) as TXN_AMT ,sum(idl.MID_AMT) as MID_AMT ,sum(case when idl.RATIO>0 then idl.TXN_AMT*idl.RATIO else idl.TXN_AMT*100 end)/100 as TXN_AMT_RO ,sum(case when idl.RATIO>0 then idl.MID_AMT*idl.RATIO else idl.MID_AMT*100 end)/100 as MID_AMT_RO ,sum(idl.MID_AMT*idl.RATIO*coalesce(ra.PER_FEE_RATION,0)/100)/100 as PER_FEE_RO from ibs.T2_YBDB_INS_DETAIL idl left join ibs.T5_EMP emp on emp.EMP_ID=idl.EMP_ID left join IBS.T5_ORG org on org.ORG_ID=emp.ORG_ID and org.ORG_TYPE_ID='AO' left join ibs.T5_YBDB_PER_FEE_RATION ra on idl.MEASURE_DT>=ra.ST_DT and idl.MEASURE_DT<=ra.ED_DT group by MEASURE_DT,idl.EMP_ID,coalesce(emp.EMP_NM,'未认领') ,idl.PSTN_TYPE ,idl.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,idl.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,idl.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,org.ORG_ID ,org.ORG_NM ,org.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,org.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,org.HEAD_ORG_ID )t where {#condition#} group by EMP_ID,EMP_NM,PSTN_TYPE,PSTN_TYPE_NM,SUB_PSTN_TYPE,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM,ORG_ID,ORG_NM,BRANCH_ORG_ID,BRANCH_ORG_NM,HEAD_ORG_ID order by RNK_LJ

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE BRANCH_ORG_NM||'机关' END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') and HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM
